title: Validate Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-MXFP4 at TP=4 (with allreduce-fusion workaround)
description: Serve the large model at /data/models/amd-Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-MXFP4 at TP=4 via sgl_runner. Use TOKENSPEED_DISABLE_ALLREDUCE_FUSION=1 (issue #2 workaround). Confirm coherence; characterize the async wrong-first-token+hang from issue #1.

title: [issue#1 P0] Qwen3.5-397B async kernel-ordering race: wrong first token + decode hang
description: github raikonenfnu/tokenspeed#1. On 397B TP=4/8, async execution produces wrong first token (4262 'PP' instead of 11751 ' Paris') then hangs in decode at reset_states (runtime_states.py:79). Disappears under HIP_LAUNCH_BLOCKING=1 --enforce-eager => stream-ordering/sync bug. Localize via selective sync, add record_stream/event so reset_states reuse waits for prior step consumers. Audit runtime/engine/event_loop.py (_dispatch_forward l.630, _commit_forward_results l.1071), runtime/states/runtime_states.py:79, model_executor.py:1223.

title: Validate Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-MXFP4 coherence (TP=1)
description: After applying the 3 fix commits, serve the small model at /data/models/amd-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-MXFP4 via sgl_runner/amd-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-MXFP4/run_tokenspeed.sh (TP=1) and confirm coherent greedy output via test_coherence.sh / coherence_suite.py. This is the fast bringup gate before touching 397B.

title: Apply GDN/MoE/quant fix commits (cherry-pick 3 commits)
description: Cherry-pick cf5e5d4 (keep Qwen3.5 GDN in_proj/out_proj bf16 under MXFP4), f3ba2c2 (stop using gfx950 Gluon MXFP4 MoE for plain-silu models), 5db9e3f (drop prefix-cache h-track on portable Triton extend path) from raikonen/gdn_fixes onto raikonen/gdn_rebased. Drop the .beads/config.yaml and .beads/issues.jsonl hunks from cf5e5d4 since beads was just re-initialized.

title: [issue#2 P1] Qwen3.5-397B TP=8 Iris symmetric-heap fd-passing deadlock
description: github raikonenfnu/tokenspeed#2. At TP=8, fused allreduce+RMSNorm lazily builds Iris symmetric-heap context -> all_gather_object hangs on all 8 ranks (setup_fd_infrastructure). TP=4 works. Likely fix: pass explicit device_id=torch.device('cuda', local_rank) to init_process_group, or dedicated gloo PG for fd exchange, or eager Iris init. Workaround in place: TOKENSPEED_DISABLE_ALLREDUCE_FUSION=1. Code: tokenspeed-kernel ops/communication/iris.py (l.91, l.702), ops/communication/triton.py:1568, runtime/layers/layernorm.py:309, runtime/distributed/comm_manager.py:306.
